name: @skopeo/opencode-review-experiment
description: Self-contained experiment for building a code review agent with the OpenCode SDK.

scripts.format: biome format --write package.json tsconfig.json README.md SDK_GUIDE.md src examples .opencode/tools fixtures/review-target/src
scripts.format:check: biome format package.json tsconfig.json README.md SDK_GUIDE.md src examples .opencode/tools fixtures/review-target/src
scripts.lint: biome check package.json tsconfig.json README.md SDK_GUIDE.md src examples .opencode/tools fixtures/review-target/src
scripts.lint:fix: biome check --fix package.json tsconfig.json README.md SDK_GUIDE.md src examples .opencode/tools fixtures/review-target/src
